content.en:
Cangyu Realm.

The Lord of Cangyu took Ye Tian to the most central part of the Cangyu Realm.

The Cangyu Realm is not a simple world, but a vast world composed of many worlds, and the great opportunity that the Lord of Cangyu said is in the core of the world.

That world was completely shielded by the Lord of the Blue Feather, and it was difficult for even the Lord to spy on the existence of that world.

And in the Cangyu Realm, no one knows about that world, and it is a world that is not from the outside world.

Now, this world has ushered in Ye Tian.

----------

After entering this realm within the world, the Lord of Cangyu introduced: "This world, I named it Cangshen Realm, besides me, you are the second creature to enter this world!"

Under the guidance of the Lord of Cangyu, Ye Tian came to an area in the center of the Cangshen Realm.

Here, Ye Tian saw an ancient stone gate, standing in the air like this.

"This is it!"

The Lord of Cangyu pointed to the stone gate and said: "This stone gate is very mysterious, and I don't know the origin, but it is obviously not something from this cosmic era, and there is no information in it that says which cosmic era it comes from, nor does it have any inheritance, but when you enter it, you will understand the importance of this opportunity." Once inside, there is no time limit, and you can stay in it all the time as long as you can persevere, but you can't actually do it. At the beginning, I was forced to come out after only three years. "

"Lord of the Blue Feather, does this opportunity have anything to do with cultivation?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is no direct relationship!" the Lord of Cangyu said: "Actually, it doesn't affect the level of cultivation, you will understand it after you enter!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately prepared to enter the stone gate.

But as soon as he was about to rush in, he was ejected.

"I forgot to remind you, you must open the time talent and wrap yourself with the power of time before you can enter the space opposite the stone gate!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood, and immediately turned on the time talent, wrapped himself with the power of time, and rushed into the stone gate.

Rumble!!!

After the void transformation, Ye Tian came to another world.

But Ye Tian had just come in, and the first thing he observed was not the surrounding environment, but his body.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

His current body was as if it were not his own, and it was filled with the power of time, a body composed entirely of time.

"This is the latitude of time!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The place where he now stands is certainly not the real world, but a world latitude, and he is now a part of time.

No!

It should be said that his body is still in a special place, but his consciousness has come to time.

Here, his immortal soul, physical body, and strength could not be carried over.

"No wonder the Lord of Cangyu said that this opportunity has nothing to do with cultivation. Even if the cultivation is strong, I'm afraid there is no way to bring the strength over, so it makes no difference if the cultivation is high or low!" Ye Tian muttered.

But soon, his expression changed.

"No, I didn't bring anything here!" Ye Tian was shocked, "The copying talent was brought over!"

Ye Tian saw in his consciousness the talent imprint of the copying talent.

"It's strange, the other talents didn't come with me, and the talent mark of the copy talent actually followed, I remember that if I was only conscious before, I couldn't carry the copy talent!

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

Moreover, the talent of time was not carried over.

"I didn't bring the time talent with me, so how can I make the time talent transform?"

Ye Tian was even more strange.

This time dimension is like a world, and Ye Tian walks casually.

Suddenly.

He saw a grass, and this grass contained a strong power of time.

Ye Tian walked over, picked this grass, and immediately prepared to refine this grass, trying to see if he could use the things here to enhance his strength in this time dimension world.

Soon, Ye Tian refined this grass, and the time power on his body was a little more.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply as his time talent appeared on his body.

【Time Talent: Advanced】

This is definitely not Ye Tian's original time talent, his original time talent and the fusion with the space talent have become a god-level time and space talent, and it is impossible to be a high-level time talent.

"I understand, pull the consciousness into the time dimension, and then use a special method to let the creatures with god-level time talents have a time talent again, and when they return, the two time talents will be forcibly fused, and maybe they can cause the transformation of the time talent and become a level beyond the god level. "

Ye Tian thought.

Next, Ye Tian continued to look for all kinds of treasures containing the power of time in this time dimension world, frantically refining these treasures, and constantly improving his time talent.

Gradually, Ye Tian's time talent became higher and higher, but the suppression of him by this time dimension became more and more serious.

In addition, Ye Tian found that when his time talent was higher, he could be immune to the suppression of him by the time dimension world to a certain extent.

"The Lord of the Blue Feather has held out for three years, I don't know how long I can hold on?"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

In the blink of an eye, two years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's time talent had already reached the arcane level.

But it is more difficult to upgrade from the Mystery Level to the God Level, based on Ye Tian's guess, the Lord of Cangyu will definitely be able to raise the time talent to the Mystery Level here, after all, it is just refining some time treasures, and there is no skill.

But in the end, the Lord of Cangyu failed, and he did not let the time talent rise to the level of surpassing the god level.

Obviously, in this time dimension world, it is not enough to have an arcane-level time talent!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"You must raise your time talent to the god-level level!"

Ye Tian was firm.

In the blink of an eye, another few months passed, and Ye Tian felt that he couldn't hold on anymore.

"Could it be that I will also fail like the Lord of the Feathers? No, I must succeed, this is an opportunity against the sky, no one in this universe can create such a place, if I lose this opportunity, I will never be able to encounter such an opportunity again!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he moved as fast as he could, flying as fast as he could.

He no longer looked for those ordinary time treasures, and no matter how much they were refined, they were useless.

He needs more precious treasures, so he can only have a glimmer of hope if he keeps flying, flying farther away.

"Roar!"

A beast roar caught Ye Tian's attention.

"What, there are creatures?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Could it be a time creature?" Ye Tian guessed.

Immediately, he became excited.

If it is really a time creature, then the time creature must have a time talent, and if he brings the copy talent, he can completely copy the time talent on the other party.

"Find the creature!"

Ye Tian looked for the sound and left.

Soon, Ye Tian finally saw a creature.

The creature resembles a goat, but is many times larger, resembling a mountain.

At this time, the creature was eating some grass on a grassland, which had a good time power.

"Copy the talent, check!"

Ye Tian instantly checked the talent of this creature.

Talent Identification
Species: War of Time Sheep
Bloodline Talent: Hong
Time Talent: Mystery

......

"It's just an arcane-level time talent!"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

But the appearance of the War of Time Sheep is undoubtedly good news, and perhaps there are god-level time-gifted creatures in this world.

Next.

Ye Tian followed this time war sheep, in case this time war sheep had a clan, he could find other time war sheep, and there was hope that he would be copied to the god-level time talent.

After several days of tracking, the war sheep finally galloped in one direction.

A few days later.

Ye Tian was led by the time battle sheep, and finally saw a group of time war sheep.
